name: SoftAurora
description: A WebGL aurora borealis background effect using OGL with Perlin noise. Renders a soft, animated gradient aurora with configurable colors, noise, and optional mouse interaction.

speed.description: Animation speed of the aurora movement.

brightness.description: Brightness multiplier for the aurora colors.

color1.description: First aurora color in hex format.

color2.description: Second aurora color in hex format.

noiseFrequency.description: Frequency of the Perlin noise pattern.

octaveDecay.description: Decay factor for Perlin noise octaves.

layerOffset.description: Offset between the two color layers.

colorSpeed.description: Speed of the color transition animation.

enableMouseInteraction.description: Enable mouse-based interaction with the aurora.

mouseInfluence.description: Strength of mouse influence on the aurora distortion.

examples.title: Custom colors with interaction
examples.code: <SoftAurora color1="#00ff88" color2="#0066ff" speed={0.8} brightness={1.2} enableMouseInteraction mouseInfluence={0.5} />

aiPromptHint: SoftAurora fills its parent container. Set the parent to have explicit width/height. Use color1 and color2 to control the aurora gradient. enableMouseInteraction adds cursor-reactive distortion.
